name: CPI Card Group
description: CPI Card Group, Inc. is a payments technology company that provides a comprehensive range of credit, debit, and prepaid card solutions. Founded in 1982 and headquartered in Littleton, Colorado, the company specializes in card production, personalization, and related digital services. CPI Card Group serves a diverse client base, including financial institutions, fintech companies, and payment processors, by offering innovative, secure, and eco-friendly payment card products. Through its integrated technology platform, the company supports the evolving needs of the modern payments ecosystem, focusing on both physical card manufacturing and digital payment enablement.
